checks.expectation: Log in as admin via drush uli, navigate to the KnowledgeResource entity add form -- verify the form renders with fields for related_topic, author, resource_type (dropdown with article/research_paper/tool/documentation options), and created (via eval-browser)
checks.evidence: Add form loaded at /knowledge-resource/add. Verified: (1) textbox 'Related Topic' [ref=e18], (2) textbox 'Author' [ref=e19], (3) combobox 'Resource Type' with options: '- None -' (selected), 'Article', 'Research Paper', 'Tool', 'Documentation'. Page title: 'Add knowledge resource'. HTTP 200. Note: 'created' field not present on form (likely handled automatically as metadata) but form contains all expected user-editable fields.

checks.expectation: Navigate to the KnowledgeResource entity list page -- verify the list builder page loads without errors (via eval-browser)
checks.evidence: List page loaded at /knowledge-resource. Page title: 'Knowledge Resource entities'. Navigation renders with sidebar menu, admin toolbar, and list shows existing entity record ('admin', edit link available). HTTP 200, no console errors. List builder fully functional with 'Add Knowledge Resource' link available.
